basic_details.job_title: DRDO DRDE Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Defence Research and Development Establishment (DRDO DRDE)
basic_details.short_information: Defence Research and Development Establishment (DRDO DRDE) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 on the official website DRDO Official Website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions. Candidates within the age limit of maximum 28 years and holding M.Sc. in Chemistry or Life Science/Zoology/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology/Microbiology/Pharmacology/Toxicology/Immunology with NET/GATE qualification are eligible to attend the walk-in interview. The walk-in interview will be conducted on 17-06-2026 and 18-06-2026, and candidates can ea

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates; other categories as per DRDO Policy.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry or Life Science/Zoology/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology/Microbiology/Pharmacology/Toxicology/Immunology with NET/GATE
qualification.details: DRDO Junior Research Fellow (JRF) - Chemistry: First class M.Sc. in Chemistry (Physical / Analytical / Organic / Inorganic) or related fields and National Eligibility Test (NET) qualification conducted by CSIR-UGC NET JRF/LS or GATE (MHRD). DRDO Junior Research Fellow (JRF) - Biological Science: First Class M.Sc. in Life Science/Zoology/ Biotechnology/ Molecular Biology/ Microbiology / Pharmacology/Toxicology/Immunology or related fields along with National Eligibility Test (NET) qualification conducted by CSIR-UGC NET JRF/LS or GATE (MHRD).

vacancy_details.Post Name: DRDO Junior Research Fellow (JRF) - Biological Science

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month & other allowances as per DRDO HQ policy.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DRDO DRDE JRF posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Chemistry post is scheduled for 17 June 2026, and for the Biological Science post, it is on 18 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on the respective dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class M.Sc. in Chemistry or Life Science/Zoology/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology/Microbiology/Pharmacology/Toxicology/Immunology or related fields, along with NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF posts at DRDO DRDE?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- along with other allowances as per DRDO HQ policy.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the JRF posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at DRDO DRDE, with one post for Chemistry and one for Biological Science.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DRDO DRDE JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the DRDO DRDE JRF posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview conducted by the Defence Research and Development Establishment.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the DRDO DRDE office in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, PIN 474002.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions are contractual in nature.
